name: Pablo
message: To the next section of the map! felicitaciones!

name: Kee
message: Glad you made it through the smokies! Excited to see what next!

name: Mel
message: Wow. Your account popped up on my reels and now I’m following. This is so awesome. Rock on. I hope you have an awesome time. I travel a lot for work and love taking in all the scenery when I’m in different cities. I know you’ll get to see way more than I do, but still, when I’m in WV or anywhere in the mountains, I am at such peace. I hope you are as well!

name: April
message: Love the goldfish and PB&J!!! Great job handling the Smokies! Rest up you’re doing great!

name: Maggie
message: I came across your IG account and now a follower too bc this is so cool! I’m from NC and love Hotsprings! It’s a cute little mountain town. Big Pillow Brewery is a cool spot. Enjoy and thanks for sharing!
